inputs.label: Caffeine Dose
inputs.businessContext: Amount of caffeine consumed in milligrams. Typical cup of coffee: ~100 mg.

businessContext_i18n.en: Amount of caffeine consumed in milligrams. Typical cup of coffee: ~100 mg.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Miligram cinsinden tüketilen kafein miktarı. Tipik bir fincan kahve: ~100 mg.
businessContext_i18n.de: Menge des konsumierten Koffeins in Milligramm. Typische Tasse Kaffee: ~100 mg.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Quantité de caféine consommée en milligrammes. Tasse de café typique : ~100 mg.
businessContext_i18n.es: Cantidad de cafeína consumida en miligramos. Una taza de café típica: ~100 mg.

inputs.label: Caffeine Half-life
inputs.businessContext: Elimination half-life of caffeine. Default 5 hours for healthy adults.

businessContext_i18n.en: Elimination half-life of caffeine. Default 5 hours for healthy adults.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kafeinin eliminasyon yarılanma süresi. Sağlıklı yetişkinler için varsayılan 5 saat.
businessContext_i18n.de: Eliminationshalbwertszeit von Koffein. Standard 5 Stunden für gesunde Erwachsene.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Demi-vie d'élimination de la caféine. Par défaut 5 heures pour un adulte sain.
businessContext_i18n.es: Vida media de eliminación de la cafeína. Por defecto 5 horas para adultos sanos.

inputs.label: Time Until Sleep
inputs.businessContext: Number of hours from caffeine consumption to desired bedtime.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of hours from caffeine consumption to desired bedtime.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kafein tüketiminden istenen yatma saatine kadar geçen saat sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Stunden vom Koffeinkonsum bis zur gewünschten Schlafenszeit.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'heures entre la consommation de caféine et l'heure de coucher souhaitée.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de horas desde el consumo de cafeína hasta la hora deseada de acostarse.

inputs.label: Tolerance Factor
inputs.businessContext: Individual tolerance multiplier: 1=normal, <1 more sensitive, >1 higher tolerance.

businessContext_i18n.en: Individual tolerance multiplier: 1=normal, <1 more sensitive, >1 higher tolerance.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bireysel tolerans çarpanı: 1=normal, <1 daha hassas, >1 daha yüksek tolerans.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Multiplicateur de tolérance individuelle : 1=normal, <1 plus sensible, >1 tolérance plus élevée.
businessContext_i18n.es: Multiplicador de tolerancia individual: 1=normal, <1 más sensible, >1 mayor tolerancia.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
